methodology.description: Shared CSV fixture; data loaded once; only model fit timed; Julia JIT warmed up before samples.
methodology.note: Measured with the uncommitted large_random_slopes fair-design path and linear SingleFactorSlopesCache block extraction.

summary.interpretation: Rust is 1.20x faster on cold fit and 1.54x faster prepared. Linear cache setup cuts prepare_lmer from the 36 ms baseline to 11.8 ms.
